Uses of Package
com.cellsimulation.stats

Packages that use com.cellsimulation.stats
Package
Description
com.cellsimulation.app
Application entry point and JavaFX user interface layer.
com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.
com.cellsimulation.stats
Live statistics collection and history.

    Contract for objects that observe the simulation engine (Observer pattern).
